items.title: Horse Lords, “Demand to Be Taken to Heaven Alive!”
items.summary: Horse Lords’s best magic trick consists of taking some of the most academic music around—serialism, just intonation, American minimalism—and making it fun. Read full story on the Bandcamp Daily.
